## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] If this adds or changes data (quest/diary/boss/CA/account metric), I cited the source (OSRS wiki, in-game, etc.)
- [ ] If this changes the public API, I updated `API.md`
- [ ] If this changes user-visible behavior, I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## Not released`
- [ ] I have not added any runtime third-party dependencies (plugin-hub rejects these)
